ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the listing is located */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing type */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing status */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the managing agent */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the listing was recorded */,
  "total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings in the city on that date */,
  "listing_price" REAL /* Average listing price in the city on that date */,
  "sq_ft" REAL /* Average square footage of listings in the city on that date */,
  "price_per_sq_ft" REAL /* Average price per square foot of listings in the city on that date */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the listing */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the listing */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the listing was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES listing_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES listing_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listing_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the listing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the listing type */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price for listings of this type */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price for listings of this type */,
  "average_sq_ft" REAL /* Average square footage for listings of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listing_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the listing status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the listing status */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Average number of days listings in this status stay on the market */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent joined the company */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the agent */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount managed by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_listings" (
  "agent_listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent-listing pair */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the listing */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent for the listing */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date when the agent was assigned to the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_listings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, agent) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the listing or feature */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., market trends, listing activity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the market trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_data" TEXT /* Data describing the trend (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., price, square footage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "model_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was generated */,
  "model_data" TEXT /* Data describing the model and its predictions (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the forecasting model (e.g., regression, decision tree) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
